Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IUpgradeResult<T extends Formula<T>>

All Superinterfaces:
IResult
All Known Implementing Classes:
UpgradeResult
public interface IUpgradeResult<T extends Formula<T>> extends IResult
Common protocol for reporting results of upgrading a mathematical formula to a new language version.

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    getUpgradedFormula()
    Returns the upgraded formula, that is a formula in the target language version which has the same meaning as the input string parsed with the language version just before the target one.
    boolean
    upgradeNeeded()
    Tells whether any action must be taken to ensure that the input string given to the upgrader is parseable in the target version of the mathematical language.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.ast.IResult

    getProblems, hasProblem, isSuccess

  • Method Details

    • upgradeNeeded

      boolean upgradeNeeded()
      Tells whether any action must be taken to ensure that the input string given to the upgrader is parseable in the target version of the mathematical language.
      Returns:
      true iff the input formula would not be parsed correctly in the target language version

    • getUpgradedFormula

      T getUpgradedFormula()
      Returns the upgraded formula, that is a formula in the target language version which has the same meaning as the input string parsed with the language version just before the target one. When it is not possible to compute such an equivalent formula, null is returned.

      In particular, if some error was encountered during upgrade (see IResult.hasProblem(), null will be returned.

      Returns:
      the upgraded formula or null if not upgradable
      See Also:
      • IResult.hasProblem()
